Breakpoints._Preset: Normal 24h cadence (auto-installed). The guide's daily shape: hour 1 Time Machine, hour 2 Advanced Training, then the NGU marathon (energy Adv+DC NGUs, magic Yggdrasil NGU per guide ch.3+). Auto-rebirths at 24h so every run pushes the number, harvests fruits at the 24h tier (seeds), and banks ~24h beard growth. Gear auto-optimizes per segment. Requires Manage Gear + Manage Energy/Magic ON.
Breakpoints._Injector: Steady-state Normal profile (ch.3+). Leave Auto Rebirth ON. When a titan kill is actually in reach the advisor recommends Normal-LRB (a one-shot, no-auto-rebirth push) instead - switch back here after the kill.
